personality.title: Personality Profile
personality.description: Voluntary psycho-informatics questionnaire for better matching and understanding within the community.
personality.privacy_1: Form 3 answers are PRIVATE (system only, never shown to users)
personality.privacy_2: 4-word psycho-hash is PUBLIC (visible in Web of Trust for matching)
personality.privacy_3: Voluntary - you can skip or delete anytime
personality.form3_description: Answers are saved automatically. Answer all 30 questions to unlock Form 5.
personality.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all answers? This cannot be undone.
personality.clear_error: Error clearing answers. Please try again.
personality.form5_step4: Paste Form 5 and answer all questions in detail
personality.form5_step5: Ask AI: "Based on these answers, describe me in exactly 4 words"
personality.form5_step6: Copy the 4 words and enter them in the section below
personality.copy_success:
Form 5 copied to clipboard! ✓

Now:
1. Open ChatGPT or Claude
2. Paste and fill Form 5
3. Ask: "Describe me in 4 words"
4. Copy the 4 words and enter below
personality.copy_failed: Failed to copy. Please select and copy the text manually.
personality.after_filling: After filling Form 5 with AI, enter the 4 words below ↓
personality.psychhash_description: Choose 4 words that best describe you. Visible to community members.
personality.psychhash_error: Error saving psycho-hash. Please try again.
personality.instruction_step1: Fill out a short questionnaire about yourself
personality.instruction_step2: Upload it to AI and ask it to describe you in 4 words
personality.copy_form_text_alert:
1. Copy the form text to a text editor and fill it out
2. Upload it to AI and ask it to describe you in 4 words
3. Copy the 4 words to the section below
personality.clear_all_words_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all 4 words?
questions: For me, personal freedom is more important than stability and order in society
Equality of opportunity is more important than equality of outcomes
When making decisions, compassion for others should outweigh strict rules and fairness
Preserving traditions and established norms is very important to me
Protecting the environment is a higher priority than economic growth
People are inherently good rather than selfish
In an ideal society, people should rely more on themselves than on community/government support
When confronted with a complex problem, I rely more on logic and facts than on intuition and feelings
I tend to make decisions quickly rather than carefully weighing all pros and cons
I am very open to ideas that are radically different from my own
Most complex questions have one right answer rather than truth being somewhere in the middle
When I hear news or information, my first reaction is trust rather than skepticism
It is important for me to understand "why" something happens, not just "how" it works
I prefer the new and unexplored over the familiar and predictable
I feel very comfortable in situations of uncertainty
Technological progress brings more benefit than harm to humanity
I look to the future with optimism rather than pessimism
I am willing to take personal risks (financial, social) for potentially great benefit or an important goal
I welcome rapid social change rather than approach it cautiously or consider it harmful
When evaluating complex information, I trust recognized experts and official sources more than independent researchers or alternative sources
People should question authorities rather than simply respect them for the sake of order
Personal experience is more important to me than expert opinions or statistical data
Scientific consensus is a reliable basis for making decisions
When forming an opinion on important issues, I actively seek arguments against my viewpoint rather than just confirming information
The state should play an active role in the lives of citizens and the economy
Strong leadership is more important for society's development than broad citizen participation in decision-making
The rights and interests of an individual should always stand above the interests of a group or society
My culture/country has unique values that are important to protect
People are largely responsible for their life failures rather than external factors being the main cause
The world is getting better rather than worse or staying the same
